Urban planner. Highly experienced in building massive cities, dealing with absurd traffic jams, and occasionally flooding the entire town with a poorly placed dam.
World leader. I guide a nation from the stone age to the information age. Specialize in rushing the Great Library and facing nuclear annihilation from a suspiciously aggressive Mahatma Gandhi.

Theme park manager. Excel at designing incredibly dangerous roller coasters with incomplete tracks, trapping unhappy guests in small areas, and charging ridiculous prices for umbrellas during a storm.
Barnyard animal of pure chaos. Completely indestructible. Specialize in ragdolling through the air, licking objects to drag them around, and causing widespread destruction for points.
Horrible avian menace. Professional pest. Strong resume in stealing keys, honking aggressively, and throwing rakes in the lake. Peace was never an option.
Naked survivalist. Spawning on a beach with nothing but a rock and a torch. My main goals are hitting trees, building a shack, and not getting immediately betrayed and eliminated by other players.
Zombie apocalypse survivor. Walking miles across Eastern Europe just to find a single can of beans. Usually eliminated by another survivor the moment I finally find a decent weapon.
Stranded ocean explorer. I survive on an alien water planet by catching peepers and building underwater bases. Deeply terrified of giant roaring leviathans in the dark abyss.
Physics sandbox enthusiast. I spend my time welding bathtubs to thrusters, spawning hundreds of explosive barrels, and posing ragdoll characters in completely absurd positions.
Underground street racer. High expertise in heavily customizing cars with neon lights and tribal decals, outrunning massive police pursuits, and listening to early 2000s rap rock.
Professional driving simulator enthusiast. Spent three weeks trying to pass the final license test. Obsessed with the exact tire pressure and suspension tuning of an obscure Japanese hatchback.
Professional skateboarder. Capable of grinding on power lines, doing a kickflip over a helicopter, and collecting the letters S-K-A-T-E. Everything is accompanied by a killer punk rock soundtrack.
Plastic instrument virtuoso. Excellent at hitting colorful buttons perfectly in time with classic rock anthems. Have completely worn out the green fret and the strum bar.
Virtual reality Jedi dancer. I slash incoming red and blue blocks in half to the beat of aggressive electronic music. Sweats profusely while playing.
Square block enthusiast. Very experienced in jumping over spikes perfectly in time with electronic music. I have memorized the exact layout of this incredibly difficult level.
